rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 04, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT R.H.I. HOLDINGS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2008, PER AMENDED NOTICE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: MAURICE LAWRENCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 04, 2008 LINE 15. DEFENDANT WALKER MECHANICAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE SCHROEDER DECLARATION LACKS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO CONCLUDE THE BURDEN HAS BEEN SHIFTED ON SUCCESSOR LIABILITY. LAWRENCE'S DECLARATION RAISES TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT ON BOTH THE ISSUES OF EXPOSURE AND SUCCESSOR LIABILITY. THE SEPARATE STATEMENTS DO NOT PROVIDE FACTS THAT SUPPORT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discharge Of Interpleader
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 04, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT ALLIANCE TITLE COMPANY'S Motion For Discharge Of Interpleader IS GRANTED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR ENTIRE TENTATIVE RULING. A COPY OF THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IS BEING FAXED TO COUNSEL. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN-CHRISTOPHE LIEBESKIND et al VS. ALLIANCE TITLE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Award Of Contractual And Statutory Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 04, 2008 LINE 5. PLAINTIFF JEAN-CHRISTOPHE LIEBESKIND, CLOTHILDE MURALT AND ALENXANDRE LIEBESKIND'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Award Of Contractual And Statutory Fees And Costs: The motion is denied. The first amended cross-complaint alleges competing interests in the escrow funds in paragraphs 6 and 7. As explained in connection with ATC's motion for discharge, ATC's interpleader cross-complaint was filed in good faith given the competing interests in the subject funds and the Liebeskinds' inability, for whatever reason, to properly complete the required tax documentation. =(302/PJM/AY)
